Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Thanks - this looks good.

I updated 2 of the files slightly (compared them to the earlier CDS review that contained them - only
difference was lack of final newline, which not sure is signficant, but made them identical just in case).

Also, I created a separate Jira in CCSDK for removing hard coded passwords and added its Jira to the commit comment as an additional Issue-ID.

Note: I also pushed a change to CDS Frankfurt to stop installing these certs in the docker image (see https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ccsdk/cds/+/109780)
